message:
chore: bump workspace version to 0.2.1 for release

Ships 31 commits since v0.2.0, including:
- feat(server): turnkey HTTP server with Streamable HTTP transport
- feat(server): concurrent read-only HTTP request handling via session
  snapshots; dispatch_request_concurrent for lock-free read-only dispatch
- feat(server): public dispatch_request API and re-exports (#15)
- feat(core,server): enhanced resource handling, session management,
  middleware hooks, request-scoped auth context, typed session state
- feat(protocol): re-export ToolAnnotations
- fix(core): enable I/O reactor and Cx context in block_on (#18)
- fix(core,server): session snapshot isolation, duplicate request
  rejection, HTTP cancellation responsiveness, pre-failed task
  short-circuit
- fix(combinator): correct quorum_met in quorum_timeout
- fix(tasks): allow Pending -> Failed state transition
- chore(deps): bump toml to 1.1, refresh Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
